examples.title: Bigram Probability Calculation
examples.code:
FUNCTION bigram_prob(w1, w2, delta=1):
    count_bigram = get_count(w1, w2)
    count_unigram = get_count(w1)
    V = vocabulary_size()
    RETURN (count_bigram + delta) / (count_unigram + delta*V)
examples.explanation: Implements Laplace smoothing for unseen bigrams

examples.title: N-gram Generator
examples.explanation: Creates overlapping n-gram tuples from input text
